name: Etsy sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late commission reports. We automate sales data consolidation instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in consolidating sales data and calculating commissions accurately.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in consolidating sales data and calculating commissions accurately.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late commission reports. We automate sales data consolidation instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of sales data and commission calculations using spreadsheets.

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late commission reports. We automate sales data consolidation instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
